titleZh: 公司类纠纷：2024年度司法实践全景回顾
titleEn: Company-Related Disputes: A Review of 2024 Corporate Litigation Practice
abstractZh: 围绕2024年公开披露的公司类纠纷数据与典型裁判，梳理公司治理、清算退出、股权争议等争议类型的趋势与实务应对。
abstractEn: Summarizes 2024 public corporate dispute patterns and notable case outcomes on governance failures, capital disputes and dissolution issues.
